ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding goal category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "funding_goal" REAL /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., successful, failed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project (e.g., technology, art, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES funding_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding goal category */,
  "min_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount for the funding goal */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount for the funding goal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the funding goal category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project at the time of update */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the project */,
  "next_status" TEXT /* Next status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_data" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was received */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for funding */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for each funding event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "success_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each success rate entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding goal category */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate for the funding goal category */,
  "failure_rate" REAL /* Failure rate for the funding goal category */,
  "cancellation_rate" REAL /* Cancellation rate for the funding goal category */,
  "total_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects for the funding goal category */,
  "successful_projects" INTEGER /* Number of successful projects for the funding goal category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_success_rates_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES funding_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, project creator, backer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project creator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "creator_type" TEXT /* Type of project creator (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_creators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_creators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who backed the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount backed by the user */,
  "backer_type" TEXT /* Type of backer (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., project launch, project update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Parent comment ID for threaded comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
